arts.ttl: Milan vs Bologna 0-1: Ndoye Seals Historic Coppa Italia Win
arts.sum: Fifty-one years. That's how long Bologna had to wait to clear the dust from their trophy cabinet and make room for a new Coppa Italia, the third in their history, and the first since 1974. The Rossoblu prevailed over Milan in the final showdown at the Stadio Olimpico on Wednesday night, courtesy of a lone goal from Dan Ndoye. The post Milan vs Bologna 0-1: Ndoye Seals Historic Coppa Italia Win appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: AC Milan 0-1 Bologna: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Dan Ndoye becomes Bologna's hero
arts.sum: Bologna end a 51-year wait for a major trophy by defeating AC Milan 1-0 to lift the Coppa Italia trophy, with Dan Ndoye etching his name into Rossoblu history.
